src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Removed the RestTemplate bean definition as it was no longer used or required in the application context.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.human_impl: Deleted the @Bean method returning new RestTemplate()

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getter and setter methods.
Remove manual getter and setter implementations in favor of Lombok annotations to reduce code verbosity.
Replace System.out.println calls with SLF4J logger for better logging practices.
Add imports for SLF4J Logger and LoggerFactory to support the new logging implementation.
Declare a static final Logger field to be used for logging within the class.
Replace deprecated AbstractWebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer with the WebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer interface to align with modern Spring Boot practices.
Rename the logger field from LOGGER to log to follow common naming conventions.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOGGER -> private static final Logger log

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Adjust indentation and whitespace to match updated code style preferences.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.human_impl: Changed indentation from 4 spaces to tabs and adjusted line breaks.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/service.general_idea: Rename the static final logger field from LOG to log to align with common Java naming conventions.
Update the reference to the renamed logger field in the log statement.
Change indentation style from spaces to tabs for the entire class body.

src/test/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 specific annotations and imports to clean up the test class.
src/test/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.human_impl: Removed @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) and @SpringBootTest annotations along with their imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from version 1.5.9 to 2.3.0 to support Java 11.
Remove the Spring Cloud dependency management block as it is no longer used or required.
Remove the Spotify Docker Maven plugin configuration from the build section.
Add Lombok as an optional dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from test dependencies to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
Update frontend webjar dependencies to newer versions.
pom.xml.human_impl: Updated sockjs-client to 1.1.2, jquery to 3.5.1, webjars-locator to 0.40

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from spring-boot-starter-data-redis to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Bump the project artifact version to 2.0.0 to reflect the major upgrade.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Changed the default indentation size in .editorconfig from 1 to 4 to align with standard Java coding conventions.
